usage-ollamachat:
§6=== OllamaChat Commands ===
§e/ollamachat help §7- Show command help
§e/ollamachat reload §7- Reload configuration
§e/ollamachat toggle <ai-name> §7- Enable/disable AI integration
§e/ollamachat prompt <set|delete|list|select|clear> §7- Manage prompts
§e/ollamachat conversation <new|select|delete|list> §7- Manage conversations
§e/ollamachat suggests <on|off> §7- Toggle suggested responses
§e/ollamachat suggests-presets <on|off> §7- Toggle preset suggestions
§e/ollamachat search <subcommand> §7- Web search management
§7Type §e/ollamachat help <command> §7for detailed help
help-reload:
§6=== /ollamachat reload ===
§7Reloads all plugin configurations including config.yml and language files.
§7Aliases: none
 
§7Example: §e/ollamachat reload
help-toggle:
§6=== /ollamachat toggle ===
§7Enable or disable specific AI integration.
§7Usage: §e/ollamachat toggle <ai-name>
§7Available AI: ollama, plus any configured in other-ai-configs
 
§7Example: §e/ollamachat toggle ollama
help-prompt:
§6=== /ollamachat prompt ===
§7Manage custom prompts for AI conversations.
§eSubcommands:
§e  set <name> <content> §7- Create/update a prompt
§e  delete <name> §7- Delete a prompt
§e  list §7- List all prompts
§e  select <name> §7- Set default prompt
§e  clear §7- Clear default prompt
 
§7Example: §e/ollamachat prompt set helpful "You are a helpful assistant"
help-conversation:
§6=== /ollamachat conversation ===
§7Manage AI conversation history.
§eSubcommands:
§e  new <ai-name> <name> §7- Create new conversation
§e  select <ai-name> <name> §7- Switch to conversation
§e  delete <ai-name> <name> §7- Delete conversation
§e  list <ai-name> §7- List all conversations
 
§7Example: §e/ollamachat conversation new ollama talking
help-suggests:
§6=== /ollamachat suggests ===
§7Toggle suggested responses for yourself.
§7Usage: §e/ollamachat suggests <on|off>
 
§7Example: §e/ollamachat suggests on
help-suggests-presets:
§6=== /ollamachat suggests-presets ===
§7Enable or disable preset suggestions globally.
§7Usage: §e/ollamachat suggests-presets <on|off>
 
§7Example: §e/ollamachat suggests-presets off
help-search:
§6=== /ollamachat search ===
§7Manage web search functionality.
§eSubcommands:
§e  toggle §7- Enable/disable web search
§e  status §7- Show current search status
§e  engine <bocha|brave> §7- Switch search engine
§e  query <text> §7- Perform a web search
§e  setkey <engine> <key> §7- Set API key for engine
§e  setcount <number> §7- Set result count (1-50)
§e  addkeyword <word> §7- Add trigger keyword
§e  removekeyword <word> §7- Remove trigger keyword
§e  listkeywords §7- List all trigger keywords
 
§7Example: §e/ollamachat search query Minecraft 1.21 features
help-search-engine:
§6=== /ollamachat search engine ===
§7Change the active search engine.
§7Available engines: §eBOCHA §7(requires API key), §eBRAVE §7(requires API key)
§7Usage: §e/ollamachat search engine <bocha|brave>
§7Example: §e/ollamachat search engine brave
help-search-setkey:
§6=== /ollamachat search setkey ===
§7Set API key for a search engine.
§7Usage: §e/ollamachat search setkey <engine> <api-key>
§7Supported engines: bocha, brave
§7Get API key:
§7  Bocha: https://www.bochaai.com/
§7  Brave: https://api.search.brave.com/app/keys
§7Example: §e/ollamachat search setkey brave your-api-key-here
help-search-query:
§6=== /ollamachat search query ===
§7Perform a web search and display results.
§7Usage: §e/ollamachat search query <search-text>
§7Note: Results are shown directly, not sent to AI
§7Example: §e/ollamachat search query latest Minecraft update
player-only: §c[OllamaChat] This command can only be used by players!
config-invalid: §c[OllamaChat] Configuration file is invalid, resetting to default.
no-permission: §c[OllamaChat] You do not have permission to use this command!
prompt-usage:
§e[OllamaChat] Prompt Usage:
- /ollamachat prompt set <name> <content>
- /ollamachat prompt delete <name>
- /ollamachat prompt list
- /ollamachat prompt select <name>
- /ollamachat prompt clear
prompt-default-invalid: §c[OllamaChat] Current default prompt '{name}' is invalid (not found).
conversation-usage:
§e[OllamaChat] Conversation Usage:
- /ollamachat conversation new <ai-name> <name>
- /ollamachat conversation select <ai-name> <name>
- /ollamachat conversation delete <ai-name> <name>
- /ollamachat conversation list <ai-name>
conversation-default-invalid: §c[OllamaChat] Current conversation '{name}' for {ai-name} is invalid (not found).
response-truncated: §e[OllamaChat] Response was truncated due to length limit.
suggests-rate-limit: §c[OllamaChat] Please wait {seconds} seconds before generating more suggestions.
suggested-response-hover: §eClick to send this suggestion as a prompt!
suggests-presets-enabled: §a[OllamaChat] Suggested response presets have been enabled.
suggests-presets-disabled: §c[OllamaChat] Suggested response presets have been disabled.
search-usage:
§e[OllamaChat] Search Command Usage:
- /ollamachat search toggle - Enable/disable web search
- /ollamachat search status - Show search status
- /ollamachat search engine [name] - Show/change search engine
- /ollamachat search query <text> - Perform a web search
- /ollamachat search setkey <engine> <key> - Set API key for engine
- /ollamachat search setcount <number> - Set result count (1-50)
- /ollamachat search addkeyword <word> - Add trigger keyword
- /ollamachat search removekeyword <word> - Remove trigger keyword
- /ollamachat search listkeywords - List all trigger keywords
search-setkey-usage-multi:
§c[OllamaChat] Usage: /ollamachat search setkey <engine> <api-key>
Available engines: bocha, brave
search-engine-not-configured: §c[OllamaChat] The selected search engine ({engine}) is not properly configured. Please check your config.yml
search-engine-missing-api-key: §c[OllamaChat] API key for {engine} is missing. Please set it using /ollamachat search setkey <engine> <key>
search-api-key-set: §a[OllamaChat] {engine} API key has been set successfully!
search-setkey-bocha: §a[OllamaChat] Bocha API key has been set successfully!
search-setkey-brave: §a[OllamaChat] Brave API key has been set successfully!
search-count-invalid: §c[OllamaChat] Invalid count! Please enter a number between 1 and 50.
search-keyword-added: §a[OllamaChat] Keyword '{keyword}' has been added to trigger list!
search-keyword-removed: §a[OllamaChat] Keyword '{keyword}' has been removed from trigger list!
search-keyword-exists: §c[OllamaChat] Keyword '{keyword}' already exists in trigger list!
search-keyword-not-found: §c[OllamaChat] Keyword '{keyword}' not found in trigger list!
search-disabled-error: §c[OllamaChat] Web search is currently disabled. Use /ollamachat search toggle to enable.
search-no-api-key: §c[OllamaChat] {engine} API key is not configured! Use /ollamachat search setkey {engine} <key> to set it.
brave-api-key-set: §a[OllamaChat] Brave API key has been set successfully!
brave-safe-search-set: §a[OllamaChat] Brave safe search level set to: {level}
bocha-api-key-set: §a[OllamaChat] Bocha API key has been set successfully!
bocha-time-range-set: §a[OllamaChat] Bocha time range set to: {days} days
